title: WD-40 Multi Use Lubricant Spray 600ml Original Professional Formula, Multipurpose WD40 Spray Lubricant for Maintenance, Rust Protection, and Water Displacement on Gears, Threads, and Hinges
features: 5-in-1 Protection Formula: Penetrates stuck parts, lubricates moving components, provides corrosion and rust protection for metal, while displacing moisture and cleaning surfaces, making the WD40 multi use spray your complete toolbox solution.

Classic Multi-Use Application: Time-tested spray nozzle provides dependable lubricant spray coverage for workshop efficiency, ensuring this spray oil reaches exactly where needed with the control professionals have relied on for decades.

Cleans Without Attracting Dirt: WD-40 formula cuts through grease, grime, and adhesive residue on metal surfaces, providing clean maintenance spray performance for power tool accessories, workshop equipment, and industrial machinery components.

600ml Trade Size: Maximum volume anti rust spray for metal in a single can for heavy-use environments, this multipurpose lubricating spray delivers wide coverage for commercial tasks and frequent maintenance schedules.

Trusted Toolbox Essential Since 1953: Professional-grade light lubricant proven across 2000+ documented uses, and our original water resistant lubricant spray formula protects in temperatures from -45°C to 150°C for reliable performance.

Not For Specialist Tasks: While excellent for general maintenance, this isn't a dedicated rust remover spray, heavy penetrating spray, bike chain oil, chain cleaner, or brake component lubricant; choose WD-40 Specialist for those needs.
